title: November 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 3''' is the 307th day of the year (308th in leap years), with 58 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Jim Cummings]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Tracey Eddon|Tracy Eddon]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 72|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 72]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Classic Star Wars 4|''Classic Star Wars'' 4]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']] released on [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] in US.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood (TPB)|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' released for the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation Portable|PlayStation Portable]] and [[Wikipedia:Nintendo DS|Nintendo DS]].
*2009 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed: Ultimate Sith Edition]]'' released for the [[Wikipedia:Xbox 360|Xbox 360]], [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 3|PlayStation 3]], and [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*2009 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season One|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': The Complete Season One]] released.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic 5: Blood of the Empire, Part 2]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – "[[The Gathering (episode)|The Gathering]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – "[[Breaking Ranks]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[AT-AT Attack!]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Battlefront: Twilight Company]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: Kanan Vol. 1 — The Last Padawan]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – "[[The Engineer]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Elee & Me]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Complete Vehicles, New Edition]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season 2 Poster Book]]'' published.
*2020 – [[Naboo (booklet)|''Naboo'']] published in Spanish.
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 17|''Bounty Hunters'' 17]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars (2020) 18|''Star Wars'' (2020) 18]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
